wearresistant fabric. And inside you'll

videos.title: Best Men's Ski Jackets for WInter 2025/26
videos.description:
Best Men's Ski Jackets for WInter 2025/26

Here are our top-tested men’s ski jackets for Winter 2025–26 — from affordable all-mountain options to high-end freeride shells. Quick specs and standout features for each jacket.

1. Dope Spartan — £175
15K/15K DRY Tech, PFAS-free DWR, Fellex insulation. Great value all-mountain performance.

2. Montec Doom — £218
20K/20K shell, asymmetric zip, Comfortemp insulation. Tough and weatherproof.

3. Rab Firewall Alpine — £250
3-layer Pertex Shield, 20K/20K, pit zips. Light, quiet, dependable.

4. OOSC Yeh Man — £350
Insulated, waterproof, big vents and pockets. Warm, bold resort jacket.

5. Jack Wolfskin Prelight 3-in-1 — £260
Shell + Primaloft vest, recycled materials. Flexible for all conditions.

6. Patagonia Powder Town — £320
H2No waterproofing, recycled, PFC-free, RECCO. Sustainable, reliable protection.

7. Montane Alpine 850 Down — £400
850 fill HyperDry down, box-wall baffles. Huge warmth-to-weight.

8. Schöffel Pontre Shell — £450
20K/20K Venturi, stretch, vents, RECCO. Quiet, breathable layering shell.

9. Peak Performance Whitelight — £490
HIPE stretch, Solarcore insulation, Graphene. Warm and refined.

10. Rab Khroma Latok GTX PRO — £595
ePE GORE-TEX PRO, articulated, removable skirt. Stormproof touring shell.

11. Helly Hansen Ridge Infinity Stretch — £700
LIFA INFINITY, PrimaLoft Gold, H2FLOW. Warm, agile, fully featured.

12. The North Face Summit Verbier STX — £630
3-layer DryVent/GORE-TEX, seam-sealed. Technical, precise fit.

13. Peak Performance Vertical PRO — £690
ePE GORE-TEX PRO, athlete-developed, RECCO. Big-mountain protection.

14. Arc’teryx Rush — £750
ePE GORE-TEX PRO, shorter cut, dump pockets, pit zips. Top-tier touring shell.

15. Descente Finder — £759
Dermizax 20K/15K, 3M Thinsulate, Heat Navi. Warm, athletic piste performance.

What You’ll Learn:
– How waterproofing/breathability affect performance
– Differences in insulation tech
– Best value in the £150–£400 range
– When to upgrade to a premium shell
– How recycled + PFAS-free tech lead 2025 outerwear

More from InTheSnow:
Best Men’s & Women’s Jackets 2025
Best Budget Jackets Under £200
Subscribe for weekly gear reviews and ski inspiration.

#SkiJackets #SkiGearReview #SnowboardGear #InTheSnow #Winter2025 #Skiing #Snowboarding #GearGuide #SustainableSkiing #OutdoorStyle
